item.title: SPIKE: Apple Platform AI — WWDC 2026 Evaluation
item.intent: Evaluate Apple platform AI APIs after WWDC 2026 and prototype ApplePlatformAIProvider if APIs are available
item.description: Scoped to the WWDC 2026 evaluation window (June 2026). After WWDC, review all new Apple developer documentation for system-level AI APIs (on-device LLM, text generation, writing assistance APIs). If relevant APIs are announced: prototype the ApplePlatformAIProvider implementation against the AIProvider protocol, measure performance, and assess whether it replaces or supplements LocalModelProvider. If no relevant APIs: document findings and close the spike. Updates architecture decisions [A-007] and [A-029].
acceptanceCriteria: WWDC 2026 sessions and documentation reviewed for on-device AI APIs
Finding documented: APIs available (with prototype) or not available (with rationale)
If APIs available: prototype ApplePlatformAIProvider with performance measurements
Architecture decisions [A-007] and [A-029] updated based on findings
Spike closed with clear resolution (adopt, defer, or not applicable)
